step_rationale: Death-receptor-mediated apoptosis in cardiomyocytes and endothelial cells during MI; ischemic injury and endothelial damage.
mechanism: Fas mediates apoptosis in both cardiomyocytes and endothelial cells, contributing to ischemic injury and vascular dysfunction.

references.title: Novel biomarker panel measuring endothelial injury identifies patients at risk of coronary artery syndrome and discordance with low-density lipoprotein cholesterol.
β-Caryophyllene inhibits Fas- receptor and caspase-mediated apoptosis signaling pathway and endothelial dysfunction in experimental myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Journal of biochemical and molecular toxicology

references.title: The protective effect of peony extract on acute myocardial infarction in rats.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
